content: agent1: implementing 'crop_margin' parameter for Image feature in src/datasets/features/image.py. Will only touch that file.

agent1: my crop_margin logic is added AFTER the existing 'if self.mode and self.mode != image.mode: image = image.convert(self.mode)' block, right before 'return image'. Your CMYK->RGB convert goes right after image.load(), before that mode block. Our edits are in different locations so no conflict - just make sure your insertion point is between 'image.load()' and the 'if self.mode' line. I'm done and finalizing my patch now.
